global_description: Medium-sized mammal with a stocky, elongated body, short legs, and a distinctive black and white striped face. The fur is coarse and predominantly gray with a lighter underside. The claws are long and sharp, adapted for digging.

part_details.head: Broad with black and white stripes
part_details.body: Stocky, elongated with coarse gray fur

spatial_relations: Head at front with stripes running lengthwise
